ddls:
CREATE TABLE "harmonic_data" (
  "harmonic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each harmonic data entry */,
  "harmonic_number" INTEGER /* Harmonic number for the data entry */,
  "kp" REAL /* kp value for the harmonic data */,
  "kd" REAL /* kd value for the harmonic data */,
  "kw" REAL /* kw value for the harmonic data */,
  "electrical_phase_angle" REAL /* Electrical phase angle for the harmonic data */,
  "mechanical_phase_angle" REAL /* Mechanical phase angle for the harmonic data */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset to which this harmonic data belongs */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., experiment, simulation) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("harmonic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_harmonic_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_harmonic_data_harmonic_number FOREIGN KEY ("harmonic_number") REFERENCES harmonic_numbers ("harmonic_number_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "harmonic_numbers" (
  "harmonic_number_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each harmonic number */,
  "harmonic_number" INTEGER /* Harmonic number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the harmonic number */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the harmonic number (e.g., fundamental, higher-order) */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency associated with the harmonic number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("harmonic_number_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phase_angles" (
  "phase_angle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phase angle */,
  "harmonic_number_id" INTEGER /* ID of the harmonic number for the phase angle */,
  "electrical_phase_angle" REAL /* Electrical phase angle */,
  "mechanical_phase_angle" REAL /* Mechanical phase angle */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset to which this phase angle belongs */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the phase angles were recorded */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the phase angles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_angle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phase_angles_harmonic_number_id FOREIGN KEY ("harmonic_number_id") REFERENCES harmonic_numbers ("harmonic_number_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phase_angles_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Active status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "harmonic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the harmonic data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the harmonic data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the harmonic data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_harmonic_id FOREIGN KEY ("harmonic_id") REFERENCES harmonic_data ("harmonic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "harmonic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the harmonic data */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the harmonic data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_harmonic_id FOREIGN KEY ("harmonic_id") REFERENCES harmonic_data ("harmonic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "granted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who granted the permission */,
  "granted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was granted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_granted_by FOREIGN KEY ("granted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
